honest_boundary_f0.claim: sub-bit uniform AND treated both collapsed on a real forward

organ_inversion.action: allocate bits to gate/up first, spend the slack on down
organ_inversion.claim: mlp1 (gate+up) is the SENSITIVE organ; mlp2 (down) tolerates more.
organ_inversion.evidence: F0 gpt-oss-120b real forward; F1 qwen3-235b dominant_failure_organ=gate

routing_frequency_allocation.claim: allocate rate by measured expert routing frequency
routing_frequency_allocation.requirement: ~1000 calibration tokens; 88 is NOT enough (median split 63.6 percent stable, 26.1 percent of cells never route)

row_norm_stratification.claim: 94 percent of gate/up rows collapse onto ONE codeword because row norms span 1e-5..0.91; stratify by row norm

space_filling_gain.claim: rel_error falls monotonically with VQ dimension at fixed rate

quality_contract.law: byte plan != capability; only a real parent-vs-packed forward selects a frontier

source_revision.note: re-downloadable from the pinned revision; harvest completed before release

storage_policy.rationale: a single lockstep pass has ZERO cross-layer reuse; a 64GB cap gave 0 evictions, drove RAM 70->18GB and swap to 906MB free. Aggressive RAM only where real reuse exists.
storage_policy.source_release: release source after harvest; re-download from pinned revision

inventory_is_a_free_variable.claim: under a FIXED complete ceiling, halving the expert inventory and doubling the survivor rate is budget-neutral, so the rate-distortion floor on the surviving experts falls without spending a single extra bit

organ_inversion.action: allocate bits to gate/up first, spend the slack on down
organ_inversion.claim: mlp1 (gate+up) is the SENSITIVE organ; mlp2 (down) tolerates more.
organ_inversion.evidence: F0 gpt-oss-120b real forward; F1 qwen3-235b dominant_failure_organ=gate

post_hoc_rate_distortion_wall.claim: post-hoc coding of frozen weights is at its bound

routing_frequency_allocation.claim: allocate rate by measured expert routing frequency
routing_frequency_allocation.requirement: 1200-token corpus DISJOINT from the scored holdout; the sealed 88-token statistics were collected on the scored prompts themselves

row_norm_stratification.claim: 94 percent of gate/up rows collapse onto ONE codeword
row_norm_stratification.evidence: measured single-codeword share 0.0267 mean, max 0.047, on real Qwen3-235B at d16 k1024 across 5 layers x 3 organs x 8 experts

same_budget_doctor.claim: spend the ceiling remainder on a diagnosis-driven sparse residual over the organ with the worst rate-distortion floor

scale_invariant_vq.claim: quantize the row DIRECTION and ship one bf16 scale per row
scale_invariant_vq.note: the strictly stronger form of row-norm stratification; wins in proportion to the row-norm span of the cell and vanishes where the span is flat

ceiling.upward_bracketing: PERMANENTLY REJECTED. No 1.2 / 1.5 / 2 / 3 BPW anchor may be scheduled. SUBBIT_UNSOLVED is emitted instead of an Escape Receipt.

mandatory_for_every_future_adapter: state which Qwen3-235B failure it avoids (name the atlas entry)
state which materially NEW method family it begins with, not which hyperparameter it retunes
state how it falsifies the assumption it transferred in
start at least as aggressively as this generation: no parent may begin above 1.0 complete BPW because a previous parent's codec failed
declare calibration and scored holdout separately and prove them disjoint
